title: Origins: Forgotten Armor Revive
description: After getting an upgrade from his Master, he begin his adventure of exploring this world, and still fighting. Forever.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Forgotten Armor Revive
### **After getting an upgrade from his Master, he begain his adventure of exploring this world, and still fighting. Forever.**

## Core System
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1e2ceed75fbc6ff4179cba480f3aaa41252fc83.png)Mystery power
  - You have a mana system, but you can only restore it by using (Primary Active) when holding [Amethyst Shard/ Block] or standing still for some period of time. You will increase your maximum mana from four to seven by having a [Nether Star] in your inventory.
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86aaf49cd6c83de68631fb295bf74c36dc6a5e23.png)Mystery Source
  - You can craft [Budding Amethyst] with four [Amethyst Block],  You will gain {Regeneration} when restoreing extra mana, level will scale with the extra mana you gain from restoreing it.

## Core Survival Power
- 🛡️Living Armor
  - You have Maximum of half heart as default. You won't run out of hunger, and you dont have narual regeneration. All damage on you only deal half heart to you. You cant swim up in water.
- ⬆️Self Upgrade
  - You wont get any defense point from armor, instead, you recieve extra health per defense point.
- 🪨Heavy
  - All damage on you only deal half heart to you. You cant swim up in water.
- ✨Blessed Soul
  - By the bless from your Master, he give you an chestplate before you go. Villager and Iron Golem no longer scare of you, But you still are little transparent and having gray vision.

## Core Fighting Power
- ⚔️Own style
  - The better stats( Attack Damage * Attack Speed) of your holding weapon/ tool, the higher movement speed you gain from running, but slower from walking. You dont like using bow, crossbow, shield and trident.
- 🔄Reverse Hold
  - Your attack will mark on target. Using (Secondary Active), you can switch the position and item on main hand with your marked target. Cost 3 Mana. 5s Cd.
